title: Multiplex SARS-CoV-2 RT-qPCR protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6i4u6","text":"An in-house multiplex RT-qPCR , targeting SARS-CoV-2and PDV as internal control [1][2], developed on QuantStudio 7 Pro Real-Time PCR Systems using Life Technologies Taqman FastVirus 1-step mastermix with E-gene primers and probe as described by Corman et al. and N1 primers and probes as described by the CDC[3, 4].","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":252,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5ka68","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"297ri","text":"1.Clancy, A. eta al., The development of a qualitative real-time RT-PCR assay for the detection of hepatitis C virus European Journal Microbial Infectious Diseases, 2008. 276(12): p.1177.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":22,"length":95},{"style":"bold","offset":171,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7l9tk","text":"2.Wolters, F., et al., Multi-center evaluation of cepheid xpert® xpress SARS-CoV-2 point-of-care test during the SARS-CoV-2 pandemic. steps: Run the RT-qPCR program: A B C 1 Time (s) Temp (°C) 2 1x 300 55 3 1x 20 95 4 40x 3 95 5 30 58 RT-qPCR program Quantstudio 7 thermocycler

Prepare the RT-qPCR master mix: %s %s ABC1ReagentsVolume 1 reaction (ul)x10024x TaqMan Fast Virus 1-Step Master Mix55003NSP6_Forw (300nM/reaction)0.5504NSP6_Rev (300nM/reaction)0.5505Probe (300nM/reaction)0.5506RNA8.5-7Total15-

Reconstitute the oligos and probes to 100uM with nuclease-free water, vortex briefly and prepare the primer/probe mix: A B C 1 100uM stock Volume (1 reaction) Volume (1000 reactions) 2 tm PDV F1 (100 nM/reaction) 0.015 µl 15 µl 3 tm PDV R1 (100 nM/reaction) 0.015 µl 15 µl 4 tm PDV P (100 nM/reaction) 0.015 µl 15 µl 5 2019-nCoV_N1-F1 (600 nM/reaction) 0.09 µl 90 µl 6 2019-nCoV_N1-R1 (600 nM/reaction) 0.09 µl 90 µl 7 2019-nCoV_N1-P (200 nM/reaction) 0.03 µl 30 µl 8 E_Sarbeco_F1 (400 nM/reaction) 0.06 µl 60 µl 9 E_Sarbeco_R2 (400 nM/reaction) 0.06 µl 60 µl 10 E_Sarbeco_P1 (200 nM/reaction) 0.03 µl 30 µl 11 Nuclease-free water 0.345 µl 345 µl 12 Total 0.75 µl 750 µl Note: The primer/probe mix can be prepared in advance, aliquoted in microcentrifuge tubes, and stored at -20°C for 1 year.
authors: Lieven B J van der Velden
Jeroen H B van de Bovenkamp
creator: Peter Krijger
